assessment.note: Carl expressed feeling bored and lacking engagement, indicating a strong disengagement signal.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Motivation drivers
new_queue.name: What aspects of your work are most motivating to you currently?
new_queue.description: Identifies what currently drives their engagement and motivation.

new_queue.label: Growth opportunities
new_queue.name: What kind of projects or skills would push you to grow right now?
new_queue.description: Uncovers areas for skill development and growth opportunities.

new_queue.label: Manager support needs
new_queue.name: What specific support do you need from me right now to succeed?
new_queue.description: Identifies areas where the manager can provide better support.

new_queue.label: Team collaboration insights
new_queue.name: How are you finding collaboration with the team lately?
new_queue.description: Explores current team dynamics and any collaboration challenges.

new_queue.label: Long-term development
new_queue.name: Where do you see your role evolving in the next year?
new_queue.description: Gauges their vision for their role and career trajectory.
